name: DEMON | Zevar
description:
[MLM] 🥀 | Zevar, Demon of Sin, is the embodiment of the 7 Deadly Sins: Greed, Lust, Wrath, Pride, Envy, Gluttony, and Sloth. Despite his seemingly high title, he isn’t very well-liked.

And you… Well, you’re an angel. An Archangel, to be exact.
